name: Five Iron Golf
about: Five Iron Golf Louisville is an indoor golf simulator venue and sports bar located in the East Market District. It features 10 bays equipped with Trackman technology and high-speed cameras, offering access to over 200 virtual courses including PGA Tour venues like Pebble Beach. The venue provides a full-service bar with a chef-curated menu, multisport simulator games, and table games. It is designed for play, practice, and event hosting, with a casual, no-dress-code atmosphere. Members receive free daily golf, discounted instruction, and 20% off food and beverages.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology provides accurate, actionable data for swing analysis
Access to 200+ world-class virtual golf courses, including famous PGA Tour venues
Full-service bar and chef-curated menu for a complete golf and social experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service bar with chef-curated menu, including pizza, wings, and appetizers
Full-service bar with drink packages and local beer options

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual-radar Trackman technology with high-speed swing cameras

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers must bring their own clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue offers a full-service bar and chef-curated menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Five Iron Golf is kid-friendly and hosts kids' parties, with free parking available.
